\tzpentry{ID3413}{Capacitance Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3413 introduces Capacitance Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{C}_{\mathcal{R}}[\sigma\Psi] \;=\; \sigma\,\mathcal{C}_{\mathcal{R}}[\Psi], \label{eq:equivariance} \end{equation}
